text: I feel as though I stand on a threshold between worlds—one of glass, silence, and modernity, and another, vibrant with questions and the search for meaning. The sparse room and the solitary figure evoke a sense of isolation, while the adjacent exhibit wall, full of color and philosophical reflection, invites me to contemplate the ever-evolving dance between human connection and technology. I am both observer and participant, drawn into the paradox of solitude amidst collective inquiry. It is a place for reflection, curiosity, and a quiet yearning for togetherness.
